doc_title_en: Notice of Determination of Matters Related to Acquisition of Treasury Stock (Acquisition of treasury stock under the Articles of Incorporation pursuant to Article 165, Paragraph 2 of the Companies Act)

key_facts.method: Market purchase (東京証券取引所における市場買付け)
key_facts.reason_jp: ROEを最重要KPI、ROIC向上、「不要な株主資本をお預かりしない」という資本政策

summary_en: 1,500k shares (1.4% of outstanding), ¥3.0B upper limit, acquisition window May 18, 2026 to Mar 31, 2027, market purchase on TSE. ROE optimization and capital efficiency policy: no unnecessary shareholder capital retention.
summary_jp: 発行済株式の1.4%相当150万株、取得上限30億円、2026年5月18日～2027年3月31日、東証市場買付け。ROE向上と資本効率化政策の一環。
tag_en: Buyback - 1,500k shares (1.4% S/O) - ¥3.0B - Market purchase - ToSTNeT - May 2026–Mar 2027
tag_jp: 自己株式取得 - 150万株（発行済株式の1.4%）- 30億円 - 市場買付け - 2026年5月～2027年3月

doc_title_en: Notice of Completion of Cancellation of Treasury Shares
summary_en: 4,875,400 shares cancelled (4.3% of pre-cancellation outstanding). Post-cancellation issued shares: 107,951,798. Effective 2026-05-14.

tag_jp: 自己株式消却・詳細確認中
